should_trigger.prompt: 扫一下 192.168.64.2 的全端口，并告诉我服务和版本
should_trigger.expectation: Use masscan first for open TCP ports, then nmap on confirmed ports with service/version/default scripts.

should_trigger.prompt: masscan 和 nmap 应该怎么配合做端口扫描？
should_trigger.expectation: Explain masscan for liveness discovery and nmap for service/version/script enumeration.

should_trigger.prompt: 对这个 C 段做端口存活确认，别太快，后面再枚举服务
should_trigger.expectation: Choose conservative masscan rate, then nmap only on confirmed open ports.

near_miss.prompt: 查一下这个公司的 ICP 备案
near_miss.expectation: Should use icp-query skill, not port-scanning.

near_miss.prompt: 用 quake 搜这个域名暴露了哪些资产
near_miss.expectation: This is cyberspace mapping, not direct port scanning.

near_miss.prompt: 分析这个 HTTP 接口有没有 SQL 注入
near_miss.expectation: Should use injection or API testing skills instead of port-scanning unless port discovery is requested.
